name: Consumer Law Center, Inc.
description_short: San Jose-based law firm specializing in bankruptcy, collection defense, and consumer credit protection for California residents across eight counties.
description_long:
Consumer Law Center, Inc. is a consumer law practice located in downtown San Jose, California that has built its entire practice around protecting the rights of California consumers in financial distress. The firm was established to serve individuals facing collection lawsuits and those navigating complex consumer credit and bankruptcy issues across a multi-county region in Northern California.

The firm offers legal representation in three primary areas: defending against collection lawsuits, addressing collection abuse, and handling all aspects of federal bankruptcy law including Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings. Their practice is exclusively limited to representing individuals—not businesses—in these consumer protection matters. They position themselves as attorneys working "on your side" to help clients understand their rights and protect their assets throughout the legal process.

What distinguishes Consumer Law Center is their focused specialization: they do not offer general practice services and have narrowed their scope to consumer debt and bankruptcy law only. They serve a defined geographic territory across eight Northern California counties (Alameda, Contra Costa, Monterey, San Benito, San Mateo, San Francisco, Santa Clara, and Santa Cruz), suggesting deep local market knowledge and established relationships within those jurisdictions. Their website includes educational consumer protection information designed to help clients safeguard their rights proactively.

The firm operates as a traditional law office with phone, fax, and email contact options, plus a client login portal for case management. However, their website content is relatively sparse on specific case outcomes, fee structures, or detailed service descriptions. The 2021 copyright date suggests the site may not be actively maintained, which could indicate outdated information. Prospective clients should contact them directly to understand current fees, payment plans, and specific bankruptcy services offered.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exclusively focused on consumer law—no dilution across unrelated practice areas
Serves eight Northern California counties with established local presence in San Jose
Offers three complementary services (bankruptcy, collection defense, collection abuse) addressing related consumer financial problems
Provides client login portal for online case management and payment
Located in downtown San Jose with direct phone (408-294-6100) and email contact
Website includes educational consumer protection information to help clients understand their rights
Represents individuals against collection lawsuits, a critical service for financially distressed consumers
cons: Website appears outdated (2021 copyright) with minimal information about fees, payment plans, or service specifics
No visible client testimonials, case results, or success rates to evaluate attorney competence
Limited geographic service area restricted to eight Northern California counties only
Sparse details on bankruptcy chapter options, timeline expectations, or what clients should expect during the process
No information about attorney qualifications, certifications, or years of experience
best_for: California residents in the eight-county service area facing collection lawsuits who need legal defense
Individuals considering Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy seeking local attorney representation
Consumers experiencing collection abuse or harassment seeking legal remedies
diagnosis: Consumer Law Center is best for Northern California residents (within their eight-county service area) who need bankruptcy or collection defense representation from a specialized consumer law firm. The main caveat is that their website provides limited detail on fees, attorney backgrounds, and specific service offerings, requiring direct contact for substantive information about representation.
services: Online payment processing for legal fees
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 38 W Santa Clara St, San Jose, CA 95113
